subcodes.first_line: Render praise unto the Beloved of all worlds, for thou hast attained unto His boundless bounties and hast not been debarred from the sanctuary of His oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن محبوب عالمیان را که بفیوضات لانهایه فائز شدی و از شطر احدیه ممنوع نگشتی
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
